name: Awesome-Anomaly-Detection-Foundation-Models
description: A curated list of papers & resources on anomaly detection foundation models using large language model, vision-language model, graph foundation model, time series foundation model, etc
summaryZh: A curated list of papers & resources on anomaly detection foundation models using large language model, vision-language model, graph foundation model, time series foundation model, etc 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
whyItMatters: 最近活跃度很高，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。
